翻译文本: 翻译文本事件，其他模块可以通过触发此事件来使用翻译服务。观察者会执行翻译并设置 translated_text 字段。
Translated Text: Translation text event. Other modules can use the translation service by triggering this event. Observers will perform the translation and set the translated_text field.

翻译文本: 批量翻译事件，其他模块可以通过触发此事件来批量翻译多个文本。观察者会执行批量翻译并设置 translated_texts 字段。
Translated Text: Batch translation event, other modules can trigger this event to batch translate multiple texts. Observers will perform batch translation and set the translated_texts field.

翻译文本: 语言检测事件，其他模块可以通过触发此事件来检测文本的语言。观察者会执行语言检测并设置 detected_language 字段。
Translated Text: Language detection event. Other modules can trigger this event to detect the language of the text. The observer will perform language detection and set the detected_language field.

翻译文本: 翻译前事件，在调用翻译服务前触发，允许其他模块修改翻译参数（如源语言、目标语言、渠道等）。
Translated Text: Pre-translation event, triggered before calling the translation service, allows other modules to modify translation parameters (e.g., source language, target language, channel, etc.).

翻译文本: 翻译后事件，在翻译完成后触发，允许其他模块修改翻译结果或执行后处理操作。
Translated Text: Post-translation event, triggered after translation is complete, allows other modules to modify translation results or perform post-processing operations.

翻译文本: 翻译错误事件，在翻译失败时触发，允许其他模块处理错误、实现降级方案等。
Translated Text: Translation error event, triggered when translation fails, allowing other modules to handle errors, implement fallback strategies, etc.

翻译文本: 批量翻译前事件，在调用批量翻译服务前触发，允许其他模块修改批量翻译参数。
Translated Text: Before batch translation event, triggered before calling the batch translation service, allowing other modules to modify batch translation parameters.

翻译文本: 批量翻译后事件，在批量翻译完成后触发，允许其他模块修改翻译结果或执行后处理操作。
Translated Text: After batch translation event, triggered after batch translation is completed, allowing other modules to modify translation results or perform post-processing operations.

翻译文本: 批量翻译错误事件，在批量翻译失败时触发，允许其他模块处理错误、实现降级方案等。
Translated Text: Batch translation error event, triggered when batch translation fails, allowing other modules to handle errors, implement fallback strategies, etc.
